articles.title: Nifty Outlook for July 21: Trend remains positive till 24,000 holds; oil prices remain key
articles.description: After remaining under pressure through most of the first half, the Nifty recovered more than 100 points from the day's low in the second half, helping trim intraday losses.

articles.title: U.S. gas prices hit an average of $4 a gallon again as the U.S. and Iran launch attacks
articles.description: The price is a national average, meaning drivers in some states have been paying well over $4 a gallon for a while now.

articles.title: Europe Faces Diesel Crunch as Inventories Head Toward Multi-Year Lows
articles.description: European diesel markets are tightening rapidly as supply disruptions, Russia's diesel export ban, and low global inventories push stocks toward multi-year lows despite weaker crude oil prices.

articles.title: Gas prices top $4 a gallon again as U.S.-Iran conflict escalates, AAA data shows
articles.description: The national average for a gallon of gas reached $4.003 on Monday, the first time in over a month it has crossed that threshold, AAA data shows.
